title: Verilator incorrectly displays signed sliced wire with %d and truncates bits with %b in $display

features.name: signed wire part-select with %d format shows wrong sign
features.description: Code should include a signed wire declared with part-select range (e.g., wire signed [28:5]) assigned a single-bit value, then displayed with %d format specifier

features.name: wire part-select with %b format shows truncated output
features.description: Code should include a signed wire declared with part-select range (e.g., wire signed [28:5]) assigned a single-bit value, then displayed with %b format specifier where output is truncated to 1 bit instead of full slice width
